title: Lab review
source_review_basis: committed exact-section summaries and evidence records; full guideline documents were not retained for this pass

red_flags.text: Defines medication and report verification, DHA telehealth scope, emergency exclusions, and laboratory-monitoring purpose.
red_flags.rationale: Supports clinician-led laboratory monitoring and medicine-change context for chronic-condition virtual review.
red_flags.evidence_extract: Defines medication and report verification, DHA telehealth scope, emergency exclusions, and laboratory-monitoring purpose.

source.title: DHA Telehealth Clinical Guidelines for Laboratory Monitoring of Various Chronic Conditions/Diseases – 21

investigations.text: Lists condition-linked baseline and follow-up laboratory monitoring and states that unlisted testing remains clinician-directed.
investigations.rationale: Supports documenting reviewed laboratory results and comparison with previous monitoring results without interpreting them.
investigations.evidence_extract: Lists condition-linked baseline and follow-up laboratory monitoring and states that unlisted testing remains clinician-directed.

source.title: DHA Telehealth Clinical Guidelines for Laboratory Monitoring of Various Chronic Conditions/Diseases – 21

source_limitations: Broad result-review aliases, reason for testing, current symptoms, vitals, critical or significantly abnormal results, result interpretation, explanation, further tests, referral, return advice, pending results, fixed follow-up, and the combined history draft remain unsupported.
The workflow must not interpret a result, infer urgency, or suggest management unless the clinician documents it.
Qualified clinician review has not been completed.
All prior supported legacy-item mappings were removed because canonical item-level applicability and workflow-specific rationale were not present in explicit repository records.
curation_policy: Direct guideline curation: retain only explicitly mapped content; rewrite only with explicit item mapping; remove unmapped legacy content; add only committed exact-section evidence summaries.
